creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: danilo
Date: Sat Jan  4 00:22:33 2014
New Revision: 338604
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/338604

Log:
  - Update from 3.4.1 to 3.5.0
  - Convert USE_GMAKE to USES
  - Add stage support
  - Use options helpers
  
  PR:		ports/185336
  Submitted by:	KATO Tsuguru <tkato432@yahoo.com>

Deleted:
  head/games/angband/files/
Modified:
  head/games/angband/Makefile
  head/games/angband/distinfo
  head/games/angband/pkg-plist

Modified: head/games/angband/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/games/angband/Makefile	Sat Jan  4 00:17:38 2014	(r338603)
+++ head/games/angband/Makefile	Sat Jan  4 00:22:33 2014	(r338604)
@@ -2,36 +2,47 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	angband
-PORTVERSION=	3.4.1
+PORTVERSION=	3.5.0
+DISTVERSIONPREFIX=	v
 CATEGORIES=	games
 MASTER_SITES=	http://rephial.org/downloads/${PORTVERSION:R}/
-DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-v${PORTVERSION}
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Rogue-like game with color, X11 support
 
-USE_GMAKE=	yes
-ALL_TARGET=	#
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=		SDL X11
+OPTIONS_DEFAULT=	X11
+
+USES=		gmake ncurses
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
-CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--with-setgid=games --localstatedir=/var
-LDFLAGS+=	-lncursesw
+CONFIGURE_ENV=	ac_cv_path_NCURSES_CONFIG=${TRUE}
+CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--localstatedir=/var
 
-OPTIONS_DEFINE=	X11
-X11_DESC=	Enable X11 (graphical) backend
+CPPFLAGS+=	-I${NCURSESINC}
+LDFLAGS+=	-L${NCURSESLIB} -lncursesw
 
-OPTIONS_DEFAULT=X11
+SDL_USE=		SDL=image,mixer,ttf,sdl
+SDL_CONFIGURE_ENABLE=	sdl
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
-.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
-
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MX11}
-USE_XORG=	sm x11
-RUN_DEPENDS=	xorg-fonts-miscbitmaps>=0:${PORTSDIR}/x11-fonts/xorg-fonts-miscbitmaps
-.else
-CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--disable-x11
-.endif
+X11_USE=		XORG=sm,x11
+X11_RUN_DEPENDS=	xorg-fonts-miscbitmaps>=0:${PORTSDIR}/x11-fonts/xorg-fonts-miscbitmaps
+X11_CONFIGURE_ENABLE=	x11
 
 post-patch:
-	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|-Wno-missing-field-initializers ||; s|/games$$|/bin|' ${WRKSRC}/configure
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
+		's|-Wno-missing-field-initializers || ; \
+		 s|/games$$|/bin|' ${WRKSRC}/configure
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
+		's|.SILENT:||' ${WRKSRC}/mk/buildsys.mk.in
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
+		's|-O0||' ${WRKSRC}/src/Makefile
+
+post-install:
+	@${STRIP_CMD} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin/angband
+.for i in apex save user
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DATADIR}/${i}
+.endfor
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

==============================================================================

+++ head/games/angband/distinfo	Sat Jan  4 00:22:33 2014	(r338604)

+SIZE (angband-v3.5.0.tar.gz) = 20907673
